dialog.title: Invite others to join "{{spaceName}}"
dialog.searchHint: Search for people below or directly add their email address
dialog.searchAriaLabel: Search for users by name or email
dialog.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Write a short message that will go out with the invitation
dialog.defaultWelcomeMessage: Hi, I would like to invite you to {{spaceName}}. Have a look at the Space or click the button below to accept or decline the invitation.
dialog.emailVisibilityNote: Keep in mind that your personal email address will be visible to anyone you invite.
dialog.rolePopoverHelper: Member is always granted on accepting the invitation.

errors.invalidEmail: This isn't a valid email address.
errors.duplicateEmail: This email is already in the list.
errors.networkFailure: Couldn't send the invitations. Please try again.

results.parentNotAuthorized: Can't invite — they'd also need to join the parent space, and you don't have permission to invite there.

toast.someFailed: {{count}} invitations couldn't be sent — see the results for details.

inviteVc.title: Invite Virtual Contributor
inviteVc.description: Add a Virtual Contributor from your account, or invite one from the Alkemio library.
inviteVc.onAccountEmpty: No virtual contributors available on your account.
inviteVc.inLibraryEmpty: No library virtual contributors match your search.
inviteVc.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Add a message to the invitation…
inviteVc.defaultWelcomeMessage: We'd like to invite you to contribute to {{space}}.
inviteVc.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
